description: Single-chunk WriteRequestMessage for AccessControl.Acl (endpoint=0, cluster=0x001F, attribute=0x0000) with one entry: Administer/CASE/subjects=[1]/targets=null/fabric_index=omitted. Derived from build_list_write_chunks with big budget (>= element count) which is byte-identical to build_write_request on the same path+array. Verified by the write_acl_single_chunk_byte_parity test in matter-controller.
